scenes.description: Vesta Zeta presents her 3D birthday commemorative merchandise, starting with the Sleepy Cat Zzz Plushie.
Vesta Zeta presents the Situational Voice Pack titled 'A Fateful Meeting'.
Vesta Zeta showcases the Birthday Commemorative Full Set and the limited bonus signature postcard.
Vesta Zeta announces a special performance as a gift to her viewers.
Vesta Zeta performs 'Break It Down' on stage with backup dancers.

subtitles.original: It looks like a cat, I know, but I swear it's not, okay?
subtitles.english: It looks like a cat, I know, but I swear it's not, okay?

subtitles.original: It's not, it's um...
subtitles.english: It's not, it's um...

subtitles.original: If you noticed, it's based on my Cat Day KV, so it's so cute, right?
subtitles.english: If you noticed, it's based on my Cat Day KV, so it's so cute, right?

subtitles.original: みんな、あの、Cat Dayの時、覚えてる？
subtitles.english: Everyone, um, do you remember the Cat Day time?

subtitles.original: これ、This is the goods from last time.
subtitles.english: This... This is the goods from last time.

subtitles.original: Sleepy Cat Zzz Plushie
subtitles.english: Sleepy Cat Zzz Plushie

subtitles.original: It's so cute right? Look at those eyes!
subtitles.english: It's so cute right? Look at those eyes!

subtitles.original: It's so cute!
subtitles.english: It's so cute!

subtitles.original: I want to squish it and...
subtitles.english: I want to squish it and...

subtitles.original: ...just jumble it up! It's so cute!
subtitles.english: ...just jumble it up! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: And she's like sleeping because, um...
subtitles.english: And she's like sleeping because, um...

subtitles.original: I heard that cats nap for 16 hours...
subtitles.english: I heard that cats nap for 16 hours...

subtitles.original: ...although that has nothing to do with me, I'm just saying.
subtitles.english: ...although that has nothing to do with me, I'm just saying.

subtitles.original: Um, it's very cute, it's like sleeping.
subtitles.english: Um, it's very cute, it's like sleeping.

subtitles.original: ん〜、眠そう。眠そうゼタちゃん。
subtitles.english: Mmm, looks sleepy. Sleepy Zeta-chan.

subtitles.original: 眠いゼタちゃん。
subtitles.english: Sleepy Zeta-chan.

subtitles.original: 可愛い！
subtitles.english: So cute!

subtitles.original: Buy it or else! Or else you...
subtitles.english: Buy it or else! Or else you...

subtitles.original: ...you don't want to miss this because everyone liked the Cat Day KV.
subtitles.english: ...you don't want to miss this because everyone liked the Cat Day KV.

subtitles.original: You'll miss this.
subtitles.english: You'll miss this.

subtitles.original: Okay! Even more, let's see! Next please!
subtitles.english: Okay! Even more, let's see! Next please!

subtitles.original: 次！お願いします！
subtitles.english: Next! Please!

subtitles.original: ボイス！わぁ、ボイス！
subtitles.english: Voice! Wha, Voice!

subtitles.original: ボイス！
subtitles.english: Voice!

subtitles.original: Voice! And it's titled "A Fateful Meeting".
subtitles.english: Voice! And it's titled "A Fateful Meeting".

subtitles.original: Last but not least, there's also a bonus...
subtitles.english: Last but not least, there's also a bonus...

subtitles.original: ...for who purchases the full set.
subtitles.english: ...for who purchases the full set.

subtitles.original: Okay, full setを...
subtitles.english: Okay, the full set...

subtitles.original: ...買ってる人が、ボーナスをもらえるぞ。
subtitles.english: ...whoever buys it will get a bonus.

subtitles.original: Voice Pack
subtitles.english: Voice Pack

subtitles.original: Kalian dapet bonus kalau kalian beli full set, okay?
subtitles.english: You get a bonus if you buy the full set, okay?

subtitles.original: じゃ、Last one please!
subtitles.english: Then, last one please!

subtitles.original: 最後！お願いします！
subtitles.english: The last one! Please!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！Here's a bonus!
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Here's a bonus!

subtitles.original: うわぁ！It's the limited edition!
subtitles.english: Whoa! It's the limited edition!

subtitles.original: You'll get my signature! Okay!
subtitles.english: You'll get my signature! Okay!

subtitles.original: It's so good!
subtitles.english: It's so good!

subtitles.original: Birthday Set
subtitles.english: Birthday Set

subtitles.original: It's like handwritten signature and all that. Uh!
subtitles.english: It's like handwritten signature and all that. Uh!

subtitles.original: It's the best! It's limited so get it now!
subtitles.english: It's the best! It's limited so get it now!

subtitles.original: Limited... スペシャルだよね。
subtitles.english: Limited... It's special, right?

subtitles.original: 一番、もうスペシャル。んんん。
subtitles.english: The most, most special. Mmm.

subtitles.original: Of course, um, it's a little ad break, but we're not gonna stop there...
subtitles.english: Of course, um, it's a little ad break, but we're not gonna stop there...

subtitles.original: ...because I, even though it's my birthday...
subtitles.english: ...because I, even though it's my birthday...

subtitles.original: ...I want to give to you things instead. Yeah!
subtitles.english: ...I want to give to you things instead. Yeah!

subtitles.original: But it's not over yet!
subtitles.english: But it's not over yet!

subtitles.original: これで終わりじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: This isn't the end!

subtitles.original: It's my birthday but I also want to give you a present as well, so...
subtitles.english: It's my birthday but I also want to give you a present as well, so...

subtitles.original: ...aren't you excited?
subtitles.english: ...aren't you excited?

subtitles.original: Okay! Let's go get your present! Woo!
subtitles.english: Okay! Let's go get your present! Woo!

subtitles.original: Are you guys ready?
subtitles.english: Are you guys ready?

subtitles.original: Going going my way もうほっといて
subtitles.english: Going going my way, just leave me alone

subtitles.original: 止められないね すみ任せて
subtitles.english: I can't be stopped, just leave it to me

subtitles.original: こりごりだ Ruleは Break it down
subtitles.english: I'm sick of it, break down the rules

subtitles.original: 我慢できない Let me free
subtitles.english: I can't take it anymore, let me free

subtitles.original: 目が眩んでしまいそう 鳴り響いた誓いの中で
subtitles.english: I feel like I'm going to be dazzled by the echoing vow

subtitles.original: 憧れてただけ 然 今は何も響かない
subtitles.english: I was just longing for it, but now nothing resonates

subtitles.original: I know who I am am I
subtitles.english: I know who I am am I

subtitles.original: Brandingには興味ない 今は完全
subtitles.english: I have no interest in branding, right now I'm completely...

subtitles.original: 無視を貫くMy greedy style
subtitles.english: ...ignoring everything, that's my greedy style

subtitles.original: 野暮ったい身も興味ない
subtitles.english: I have no interest in unrefined appearances

subtitles.original: ありのままでいたいの
subtitles.english: I just want to be as I am

subtitles.original: Going going my way もうほっといて
subtitles.english: Going going my way, just leave me alone

subtitles.original: 止められないね すみ任せて
subtitles.english: I can't be stopped, just leave it to me

subtitles.original: こりごりだ Ruleは Break it down
subtitles.english: I'm sick of it, break down the rules

subtitles.original: 我慢できない Let me free
subtitles.english: I can't take it anymore, let me free

subtitles.original: We are special でしょ？ 揺るがないプライド
subtitles.english: We are special, right? My unwavering pride

subtitles.original: それだけでいいの タラレバだらけの
subtitles.english: That's all I need, in this life full of 'what ifs'

subtitles.original: My life keep it Break it down Break it
subtitles.english: My life keep it, break it down, break it

subtitles.original: We are special でしょ？ 誰に言われても
subtitles.english: We are special, right? No matter what anyone says

subtitles.original: 私は歌うよ アンフェアばかりの
subtitles.english: I will sing, in this world full of unfairness

subtitles.original: この世界など Break it down Break it 進め
subtitles.english: Break down this world, break it, and move forward

subtitles.original: Break it down Break it 進め
subtitles.english: Break it down, break it, and move forward

subtitles.original: I just don't care about you
subtitles.english: I just don't care about you

subtitles.original: ハイテクなメイクやファッション 全然似合わないよ
subtitles.english: High-tech makeup and fashion don't suit me at all

subtitles.original: 好みと心 誰の物でもないでしょ
subtitles.english: My tastes and my heart don't belong to anyone else, right?

subtitles.original: いい加減に大人だよね
subtitles.english: It's about time I grew up, right?

subtitles.original: Zeta-verse 誰も知らない 不完全だけど完璧な私
subtitles.english: Zeta-verse, where nobody knows me, imperfect but perfect me

subtitles.original: Tapi Zeta, apa adanya tidak sempurna tapi sepenuhnya diriku
subtitles.english: But Zeta, as she is, is not perfect but she is completely me

subtitles.original: でも、今は楽しいよ
subtitles.english: But, it's fun right now

subtitles.original: ありのままでいられるから
subtitles.english: Because I can be as I am

subtitles.english: Going going my way, just leave me alone
